title: The Core Issue: Beneath The Binary, Verifying Trust
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Core Issue: Beneath The Binary, Verifying Trust

From The Core Issue: A look at what Bitcoin Core developers do to ensure the software running on your computer is actually the code they wrote.

This post The Core Issue: Beneath The Binary, Verifying Trust first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mike Schmidt.

title: DV8 Becomes First Bitcoin Treasury Company in Southeast Asia with Digital Asset License
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

DV8 Becomes First Bitcoin Treasury Company in Southeast Asia with Digital Asset License

Thailand's DV8 has signed a Share Purchase Agreement to acquire Rakkar Digital, a licensed digital asset custodian in Thailand. 

This post DV8 Becomes First Bitcoin Treasury Company in Southeast Asia with Digital Asset License first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: CFTC Launches Innovation Task Force for Bitcoin, Crypto, AI, and Prediction Markets
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Launches Innovation Task Force for Bitcoin, Crypto, AI, and Prediction Markets

The CFTC has launched a new Task Force to develop clear regulatory frameworks for bitcoin and emerging technologies in U.S. derivatives markets.

This post CFTC Launches Innovation Task Force for Bitcoin, Crypto, AI, and Prediction Markets first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Hyperscale Data (GPUS) Increases Bitcoin Holdings to $44 Million

Bitcoin Magazine

Hyperscale Data (GPUS) Increases Bitcoin Holdings to $44 Million

Hyperscale Data reported buying 10 more Bitcoin for their BTC treasury strategy.

title: The Amazing Life of Chun Wang: From OG Bitcoin Miner to Astronaut
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Amazing Life of Chun Wang: From OG Bitcoin Miner to Astronaut

Chun Wang, who mined thousands of BTC early on, transitioned from f2pool operations to commanding the groundbreaking polar orbit flight over Earth's poles.

This post The Amazing Life of Chun Wang: From OG Bitcoin Miner to Astronaut first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.

title: Bernstein Predicts Bitcoin Bottomed: $150K Target as Strategy (MSTR) Holds $53.5B in BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bernstein Predicts Bitcoin Bottomed: $150K Target as Strategy (MSTR) Holds $53.5B in BTC

Bernstein, a Wall Street broker, believes Bitcoin has probably reached its bottom and maintains a $150,000 target for the end of the year.

This post Bernstein Predicts Bitcoin Bottomed: $150K Target as Strategy (MSTR) Holds $53.5B in BTC first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
